rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 15, 2014, line 1. PLAINTIFF ANDREA MANGAN's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 15, 2014, line 2. PETITIONER FRANK MYERS' MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT GRANTED. No opposition filed. Writ issued on February 7, 2014 is recalled. Peter Bonis shall file substitution/association of counsel. Prevailing party prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set-Aside May 17, 2014 Order Deeming Matters Admitted / Ccp 473
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 15, 2014, line 4. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL CARMIGNANI's Motion To Set-Aside May 17, 2014 Order Deeming Matters Admitted DENIED, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and failure to sustain burden under CCP 473(b) discretionary relief. = (501/REQ)
